response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience requirement with roughly 19 years of software development, including recent full-stack work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, plus current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling experience that directly matches an unusual requirement of this role. Cloud (AWS CDK), Docker/Kubernetes, and a strong testing/TDD culture are all evidenced. Gaps are mostly at the framework-specific level: no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest/Jest experience is listed, though the adjacent skills suggest a fast ramp-up.
strengths: Deep full-stack experience with the core stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work, matching the AI agent development requirement
Strong engineering-practice background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing workshops and open-source test libraries
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework for this role
Kotlin not listed and Java experience appears dated and limited
Significant portion of recent deep expertise is in DLang, a niche language not relevant to this stack
